rationale: Wrong codec used in DBCollection.aggregate; internal codec lookup bug, no specific spec rule cited.
Spec requires getLastError after each sub-batch even for UNACKNOWLEDGED to preserve stop-on-error semantics; driver omitted it.
Thin description; type casting hang in get(); no spec rule identified. insufficient detail.
Async Observable error-handling improvement; internal reactive API concern, no spec rule involved.
GridFS not propagating readConcern/writeConcern to underlying collections; implementation bug but no specific GridFS spec rule named.
Adding extra log statements to MultiServerCluster; logging improvement, not a spec deviation.
Thread factory should produce daemon threads; internal implementation concern, no spec rule involved.
NPE when publishing command-failed event after IOException; implementation bug, no specific spec rule violated.
continueOnError flag ignored for split OP_INSERT batches on MongoDB <= 2.4; spec-defined bulk insert semantics violated.
Bulk write checks out two sockets instead of one; internal connection management inefficiency, not a spec rule violation.
Missing InsertOneOption class in packaged 3.2.0 jar; build/packaging defect, no spec involvement.
Builder copy-constructor doesn't copy commandListeners array; internal API immutability bug, no spec rule cited.
How to encode java.sql.Timestamp; codec/documentation question, no spec rule involved.
Defensive validation of corrupted OP_REPLY header; robustness improvement, no specific spec rule violated.
Query failure bit not checked on async OP_GET_MORE; async/sync parity bug, no explicit spec rule cited.
SDAM spec updated to compare (setVersion, electionId) tuples; driver must implement this rule to detect stale primaries correctly.
SDAM spec says hostnames must be normalized to lower-case; 2.x driver omitted this; backport fix.
SDAM spec requires ServerType=Unknown when ismaster ok!=1; 2.x driver didn't handle this case.
Porting SDAM spec test suite to 2.x driver; test infrastructure work, not fixing a driver behavior bug.
MongoInterruptedException acquiring pool permit; user support question / connection pool usage issue, no spec rule violated.
Request for Java API support for $filter aggregation operator; feature request, no spec conformance issue.
MongoClient leaking unclosed cluster threads; resource leak implementation bug, no spec rule cited.
DBObject.keySet inefficiency for BasicBSONList; performance refactor, no spec involvement.
2.x driver parses 'err' instead of 'errmsg' from createIndex error response; implementation bug in error parsing, no spec rule cited.
SCRAM auth spec requires UTF-8 password support; driver rejects non-ASCII passwords; NODE-638 named as same issue.
$explain modifier silently ignored when driver uses find command on 3.2 server instead of converting to explain command.
Rephrasing error messages for unsupported/corrupt BSON per DRIVERS-281; message wording change, no spec behavior deviation.
Driver double-decodes command responses; performance regression fix, no spec rule violated.
One-byte BSON cstring optimization not ported to 3.x; performance regression, no spec rule involved.
Codec lookup optimization using array instead of two map lookups; performance improvement, no spec involvement.
Spurious MongoInterruptedException logged during pool minimum-size maintenance; implementation/logging bug, no spec rule.
BasicBSONList.keySet performance regression; internal optimization, no spec rule involved.
Deprecating Mongo property mutators that have no effect on MongoDatabase; API cleanup, no spec conformance issue.
2.x driver uses custom decoder for error documents instead of default; internal decoding bug, no specific spec rule named.
Updates.set fails for List type due to missing codec; codec API bug, no spec rule violated.
Deprecating textSearchEnabled server parameter per DRIVERS-287; API deprecation, no spec conformance issue.
GridFSFile codec fails for Java 1.8 date types; Java type-mapping issue, no GridFS spec rule violated.
Logger not passed to ErrorHandlingCallbacks; internal logging plumbing fix, no spec involvement.
ByteBufferBsonOutput.pipe copies byte-by-byte; performance optimization, no spec rule involved.
Integer overflow in buffer size calculation causes IllegalArgumentException; implementation arithmetic bug, no spec rule cited.
Documentation request to add update examples to Getting Started page; docs improvement, no spec involvement.
BsonValue Javadoc @return tags have copy-paste error; documentation fix, no spec conformance issue.
ByteBufBsonDocument.toJson() corrupts internal state on second call; implementation bug breaking command listeners, no spec rule.
NettyByteBuf.duplicate mishandles Netty reference counts; Netty integration implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
MongoClientOptions Javadoc still says 'closest server' but 3.0+ uses localThreshold; documentation inaccuracy, not a behavior bug.
Async createIndexes omits partialFilterExpression; implementation omission in async path, no specific spec rule named.
Adding parse() helper to RawBsonDocument for API symmetry with toJson(); API improvement, no spec conformance issue.
Deprecating internal ClusterDescription methods before exposing to users; API cleanup, no spec involvement.
Reduce unnecessary buffer copies in RawBsonDocumentCodec#decode; performance optimization, no spec rule involved.
Aggregate with AggregationOptions doesn't set slaveOk bit per read preference; spec requires routing reads per read preference.
